subcodes.first_line: Jinab-i-Khosrow Khan, God willing, is a servant at the Threshold, rejoicing in the glad tidings of the All-Merciful under the banner of the Word [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: جناب خسرو خان انشاء الله خادم استانند و مستبشر ببشارات رحمن در ظل لواء کلمه
subcodes.subjects: @firmness in the Covenant, @permission for visit; pilgrimage
